overall.description: A static nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a Native American campsite with a teepee, canvas tent, and campfire. Several characters gather around the fire in a forest clearing under a clear moonlit sky, with the camera remaining stationary throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest campsite with teepee and campfire

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the camp and its inhabitants around the fire

notable_agents.action: standing near the canvas tent, facing the campfire with minimal movement
seated on the ground to the left of the fire, remaining still

entered.detail: conical tent with wooden poles extending upward, illuminated from within by firelight
large canvas tent with open flap, partially illuminated by the campfire glow
burning fire providing warm orange light with smoke rising upward
tall pine trees silhouetted against the dark blue night sky
dense forest trees forming the backdrop of the campsite
bright full moon visible through the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime view of a forest campsite featuring a teepee and canvas tent surrounding a central campfire. Two characters are visible - one standing near the tent on the right and another seated on the left - both positioned around the fire's warm glow. The scene is lit by the flickering firelight against the cool darkness of the night, with a full moon visible above the silhouetted trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a moonlit forest campsite where the warm glow of a campfire contrasts with the cool darkness of the night. It begins by capturing a wide scene featuring a teepee and a canvas tent arranged around a central fire. As the flickering light dances across the clearing, the camera holds its position on two characters, one standing by the tent and another seated nearby. The scene remains steady, emphasizing the stillness of the woods while the full moon hangs above the silhouetted treeline.
